title: PLULON 60 Sheets Green Tissue Paper Bulk, Green Tissue Paper Sheets for Gift Bags for Saint Patrick's Day Gift Wrapping Birthday Wedding Holiday Flower
features: VALUE PACK: Green Tissue Paper Bulk contains 60 sheets of tissue paper; rich variety are suitable for different gift packaging
ONE SIZE: Each Green Tissue Wrapping Paper is 50cm * 35cm/(20 * 14inches), it is large enough to wrap different size of gifts
Green Series: Green Tissue Paper Sheets contain 3 kinds of green color, each color has 20 sheets, being the great decorative paper for wrapping and other art crafts
PERFECT WRAPPING: Green Tissue Paper Bulk are perfect as wrap package and filler for gift bags, box, baskets and great for art tissue paper garlands, paper flowers, decorating
KINDLY REMINDER: The Birthday Green Tissue Paper for Gift Bags is folded when delivery, it is inevitable that there will be creases; if you mind, please be careful about buying
